summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Market Data Feed (Yahoo Finance), Global State, WebSocket, and UI features. All 31 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - LIVE PRICES indicator, open positions cards, market cards with 4 signal indicators, stop controls all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

passed_tests: GET /api/market-data/status includes sample_prices with valid prices
Engine summaries have all required fields (engine_id, symbol, regime, rfit, etc.)
POST /api/engines/reset-all resets all engines and kitty to $200
Stop loss changes persist to global state
Frontend displays 'LIVE PRICES (46)' indicator in header
Frontend shows open positions as large cards at top
Frontend market cards show all 4 signal indicators (trend arrow, risk level, capital safety, failsafe badges)
Frontend stop controls (5%/10%/15%) are clickable and update state
Frontend global controls (Start All, Stop All, Reset All) work
Frontend engine detail modal shows Eligibility, Regime, R.Fit, Auto-Trade fields
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance (minor)
seed_data_creation: None - system uses real Yahoo Finance prices for 46/48 symbols
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live market data feed fully implemented and tested. Yahoo Finance provides real prices for 23 market indices and 23 crypto symbols (46 total). MATIC and RTS fall back to simulated prices as Yahoo doesn't have them. WebSocket broadcasts data_feed=LIVE with symbols_with_prices count. Global kitty starts at $200, flat $5 trades, stop loss/trailing stop adjustable 5%/10%/15%. Open positions displayed as large cards at top of dashboard. Market cards show 4 signal indicators: trend direction, risk level, capital safety, and failsafe triggers.

mocked_api.MATIC: Falls back to simulated random-walk prices (Yahoo Finance unavailable)
mocked_api.RTS: Falls back to simulated random-walk prices (Yahoo Finance unavailable)
